calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-057b hippocampal trajectory promotion gate (672a non_contributory requeue)
items.note: Requeue of V3-EXQ-672a (governance-reclassified non_contributory 2026-06-14). 672a's completion gate fired correctly (C3 PASS, ~40% candidates filtered) but C6_baseline_not_collapsed FAILED -- goal_success_rate=0.0 in BOTH arms. ROOT CAUSE = instrumentation bug (NOT a substrate ceiling): the eval loop read info['resource_collected'], a key CausalGridWorldV2.step() never emits; the env signals collection via info['transition_type']=='resource' (causal_grid_world.py:1608/2227). So goal_success was structurally 0.0 in every arm and C6 could never pass. 672b FIX (both scope-preserving; the MECH-057b completion gate _filter_trajectories_by_completion is byte-identical to 672a): (1) read goal success from transition_type=='resource' [load-bearing]; (2) num_resources 1->3 for C6 margin (identical both arms; num_hazards stays 2 so the C1 harm-reduction contrast remains measurable). Standalone probe confirmed the baseline forages (0.05-0.10 at num_resources=1). MECH-057b currently has ZERO genuine experimental evidence (exp_conf 0, lit_conf 0.857); 672b is the first run that can move it. Smoke PASS 2026-06-14: dry-run C6 PASS (baseline goal_success>0), gate engaged (filtered_fraction 0.41, non_degenerate=True, label 'ready'); C1/C2 now MEASURABLE (FAIL only at the 2-ep dry scale, the full run is the real test). validate_experiments --strict + validate_queue clean.

items.title: ARC-063 CRF availability-maintenance readiness -- clean fraction-gated re-run (666b pre-gap differentiation fix + enlarged maturation)
items.note: Claim-free diagnostic (claim_ids=[], experiment_purpose=diagnostic; does NOT weight governance). Clean re-run of V3-EXQ-666b crf_frac_maintained fraction-gate, fixing the ONE defect that starved 666b: the e2ctx full-pool differentiation NON-VACUITY precondition is now measured PRE-gap (crf_max_pairwise_rule_dist at end-of-training, before the 2000-tick context-absent silence gap erodes ARM_1's pool to empty by design; 666b read it post-gap so min-over-ARM_1+ARM_2 = 0.0 starved it even though both load-bearing criteria PASSED), and the maturation window is enlarged N_EPISODES 100->200 so the e2ctx context differentiates a >=2-rule full pool PRE-gap on every seed. LOAD-BEARING discrimination unchanged + POST-gap: ARM_2 (maintenance) crf_frac_maintained >=0.625 where ARM_1 (mature+e2ctx, no maintenance) <0.5. PASS clears substrate_queue crf-availability-maintenance ready=true + unblocks the 654c GAP-B behavioural falsifier (MECH-309/ARC-062, queued separately); substrate_not_ready_requeue (non-vacuity unmet) -> re-queue at larger P0; maintenance_insufficient / differentiation_alone_clears_ceiling -> /failure-autopsy. Dry-run smoke PASS 2026-06-14 (9 cells end-to-end, pre-gap readout functional pre_gap_dist=1.491, correct dry-scale substrate_not_ready self-route, emit_outcome sentinel written). validate_experiments --strict + validate_queue clean. MECH-309/ARC-062/ARC-063 stay candidate/substrate_ceiling/v3_pending/pending_retest_after_substrate -- NOT weakened.

items.title: ARC-046 / GAP-14 InfantCurriculumScheduler Phase 0->1 gate-robustness (K-of-N / EMA vs single-episode crossing)
items.note: Claim-free gate-robustness diagnostic (claim_ids=[], experiment_purpose=diagnostic; does NOT weight governance) for ARC-046 / infant_substrate:GAP-14. Tests defect (2) of the user-adjudicated failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-591c_2026-06-11: the single-episode-crossing Phase 0->1 gate (_try_phase_0_to_1, H_POS_FRAC_OF_MAX=0.20) admitted seed-45's near-stationary policy (h_pos_mean 0.140, 2 crossings). Re-runs the SAME 591c diversity-armed reachability probe (5 seeds 42-46, 160 ep, 200 steps/ep, MECH-313+MECH-314 ON, SP-CEM default-on; fully RNG-seeded -> deterministically reproduces the 591c traces + reproducibility check), records the full per-episode h_pos sequence per seed, and replays each through BASELINE single-episode / K-of-N (K=5,N=10) / EMA (alpha=0.2) Phase 0->1 criteria OFFLINE. The shared infant_curriculum.py scheduler is NOT mutated (610e/669/586/667 depend on its default gate). PRIMARY load-bearing C_gate_discriminates: at least one of {K-of-N,EMA} REJECTS every false-advancer (baseline-admitted but h_pos_mean<0.20 OR <2 crossings) AND ADMITS every genuine explorer (seeds 42-44). Non-vacuity preconditions (else substrate_not_ready_requeue): max h_pos>=0.20 movement floor; >=2 genuine explorers; >=1 false advancer. Seed-46 staying in Phase 0 under ALL criteria is OUT OF SCOPE -- orthogonal exploration-STRENGTH defect (Q-043/667->667a modulatory-bias-selection-authority thread), NOT a gate-criterion defect. PASS routes to /implement-substrate (K-of-N/EMA replacement for _try_phase_0_to_1); the full curriculum-vs-flat EXQ-ISEF-005 (V3-EXQ-591 successor) stays blocked until BOTH this gate fix AND the exploration-strength fix land. Smoke 2026-06-14: validate_experiments --strict OK + --dry-run runs end-to-end (criteria replay + dry-scale substrate_not_ready self-route + emit_outcome sentinel). ARC-046 stays candidate (conf 0.0); not weakened.
